embeds.title: Compositing EPIC VFX Godrays | Nuke Tutorial
embeds.description:
In this VFX compositing tutorial, we use Nuke to composite some interactive 2.5 Godrays (also sometimes called Volume Rays)

This uses a render from Blender, utilizing the position pass in order to generate screen space godrays sweeping across the environment.  You can achieve this with any render engine alongside Nuke.
